What does Voithos can do: Recommend providers in network with good ratings and close to zip code. Rating has higher weight than zip. Best match is high rating with same zip, next is high rating with zip in close proximity, then medium rating with same zip, medium rating with zip in close proximity, low rating

Suggest getting an earlier appointment based on care complexity algorithm-> if scheduling API is linked, ask user if they would like to schedule the appointment now-> if yes, take user to scheduler-> if no API go to column C.
Voithos Language: Plain english, make as a suggestion and give reason why but don't alarm user

What does Voithos can do: Detect overdo follow ups based on open items in status rules algorithm
Voithos Language: Plain english, make as a suggestion and give reason why but don't alarm user

What does Voithos can do: Send reminders for open itmes in status rules algortihm after 1 week of no resolution
Voithos Language: State to user what is open and needs addressing

What does Voithos can do: Coordinate multi-specialty visits-> If scheduling API is linked take user to schedule visit-> ask user if they would like to schedule appointments now -> if yes, take to scheduler. If no API exists-> go to column C
Voithos Language: State to user which appointment should be made first and what the determination is based on. Get determination based on clinical docs and patient/provider ambent recording.

What does Voithos can do: Add appointments to user's calendar -> if able to schedule appointment, add to users preferred calendar. -> if no API and/or no appointment has been created, no action is taken.
Voithos Language: tell user the appointment has been added to calendar.
Tell user that appointment mentioned by provider requires a referral

What does Voithos can do: Identify if a prior authorization is likely. This should be based on information retrieved from the insurance API for procedures or medications needing prior authorizations. -> if able to retrieve the medical necessity information from the insurance API, complete the medical necessity form with the information pulled through NLP from the clinical documentation and place a visit date tag at end of each answered question as to where the information came from. (Go to Column E) if unable to retrieve the medical necessity questionnaire, go to Column C
Voithos Language: Tell the user in plain english language that a prior authorization is likely needed for that procedure or medication and to follow up with the provider clinic. If medical necessity form is available, Track process in "what happened recently" in financial section with a summary.
What does the patient approve: The user needs to approve the medical necessity doc if one is surfaced with the answers given.
What is language of the document: The language of the document should come direclty from the clinical documentation.
What happens after approval: after the approval, the document is sent back to the insurance company via the API connection
Where can the patient find it later: the document is stored in settings with date and time stamp.

What does Voithos can do: Identify denial claim risks.-> system shall use the claim denial risk identification algorith=m (appendix A) to evaluate planned services, submitted claims, and payer related tasks for likelihood of denial
Voithos Language: tell the user the risk for denial based on appendix A and the actions they should take with the insurance carrier.

What does Voithos can do: Track prior authorization status if medical necessity questionnaire has been sent. Otherwise do nothing.
Voithos Language: display prior authorization status under section "what happened recently" in the financial section if applicable.

What does Voithos can do: Identify out of network risks -> use insurance benefit information to detect is patient is at risk for going out of network for a provider or medication
Voithos Language: Tell user in plain english that they are at risk for being out of network and why and where that information came from.

What does Voithos can do: Detect denied claims -> use insurance API to detect if a claim has been denied
Voithos Language: Tell user that the claim has been denied and why.
Tell user that the medication they have been prescribed is a high cost medication and recommend generic alternatives.

What does Voithos can do: Detect missing records -> records should come from the EHR patient portal API, lab APIs, insurance APIs, pharmacy API.
Voithos Language: Tell user there are missing records if applicable and what they are

What does Voithos can do: identify health gaps -> the system shall identify missing, overdue or upcioming preventive screenings and health gaps based on patient age, sex, conditions, medications, historyry, and guideline based recommendations. (Appendix B)
Voithos Language: The system shall identify basic preventive and chronic health gaps ising rule based logic and patient reported data. The system shall label gaps as due now, overdue, upcoming and shall convert high priority gaps to open actions under next best actions for patient or care advocate to follow up.
give good summary of information in plain english language for user

What does Voithos can do: Generate visit prep actions -> prior to visit, the system shall generate questions for provider that is specific to that provider's specialty and the users need based on clinical history data. Prior to visit the system shall also generate an estimated copay, deductible status, out of network risk and place in "benefits" section of the app. The system should also ask the patient if they would like to share the previsit summary with their designated caregiver if there is one and supply a "send" button. The system will then send a secure link via email to the caregiver so they can open the document securely.
Voithos Language: The system shall generate a document and notify user of the document within "next best actions" 3 days prior to provider visit. It should tell user that the documents is kept in settings but should also give user access to document under "get Help" button. The system shall tell the user of the generated financials and to click" get help" which will take them directly to the benefits module where the information will be viewable by the user (using the prototype as the UI)
What is language of the document: Document can be generated prior to the visit and stored in document section of the app in settings and should consist of questions to ask the provider during the visit, explain appointment purpose, summarize likely discussion topics and explain terminology in plain english language.

What does Voithos can do: Generate post visit summary -> the sytsem shall generate a user friendly and provier-supportive summary after a healthcare visit using structured and unstructured visit data. The summary should reduce confusion, improve adherence, clarify next steps, idenfity unresolved actions, coordinate follow up care. AI should use provider notes, diagnoses, med changes, orders, labs, imaging, referrals, follow up instructions, and voice transcripts as inputs. The system shall also ask the user if they would like to share the post visit summary with their designated caregiver if there is one and supply a send button. The system will then send a secure link via email to the caregiver so they can open the document securely.
Voithos Language: The system shall generate a document and notify user of the document within "next best actions" immediately following the provider visit. It should tell user that the documents is kept in settings but should also give user access to document under "get Help" button. The system shall put any unresolved actions identified or next steps in "next best actions" and summary of actions taken in "what happened recently".
What is language of the document: document generated after the visit and stored in document section of the app in settings and should be in plain english language. It should contain provider seen, specialty, date/time. Main reason for visit and key findings.

What does Voithos can do: Detect conflicting instructions -> user NLP to read clinical context, instructions and patient/provider recording to determine if conflicting instructions.
Voithos Language: The system shall generate a statement to the user that there are conflciting instructions and give context and recommedn follow up with their provider.
